prompt:
[Detail · Invoice]

| Line | SKU | Qty | Unit (USD) | Extended |
|------|-----|-----|------------|----------|
| 1 | A-100 | 10 | 12.50 | 125.00 |
| 2 | B-200 | 5 | 8.00 | 40.00 |
| 3 | C-300 | 2 | 15.00 | 30.00 |
| | | | **Subtotal** | **195.00** |

Which line has a math error between qty × unit and extended amount?

[Detail · Form]

> **Vendor onboarding form (excerpt)**
> Legal name: Acme Supply LLC
> Tax ID: 84-3928174
> Bank routing: 021000021
> Account: 483920174
> W-9 attached: ☐ Yes ☑ No

What is missing before payment can legally proceed?

[Detail · Spec pair]

> **UI spec:** Primary button label = "Save changes"
>
> **Screenshot caption:** Submit button saves profile updates.

Describe the mismatch between spec and caption.
rubric: Must note label text mismatch (Save changes vs Submit) and/or that both refer to profile save action but wording differs. Credit for calling out inconsistent terminology.

prompt:
[Detail · Timesheet]

| Day | In | Out | Break (min) | Hours |
|-----|-----|-----|-------------|-------|
| Mon | 09:00 | 17:30 | 30 | 8.0 |
| Tue | 09:00 | 17:00 | 30 | 7.5 |
| Wed | 08:30 | 17:30 | 30 | 8.5 |

Which row's Hours column does not match In/Out/Break?

[Detail · Shipping label]

> **Ship to:** 742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield, IL 62704
> **Bill to:** 742 Evergreen Ter., Springfield, IL 62704
> **PO:** PO-88421
> **Carton 2 of 2:** PO-88422

Which identifier is inconsistent across the label?

[Detail · Email header]

> **From:** alerts@payments.co
> **Reply-To:** support@payments.co
> **Subject:** [PROD] Payout batch #9912 failed
> **Date:** Tue, 15 Jul 2026 14:03:00 +0000
> **X-Environment:** staging

Which field suggests this alert may not be from production?

[Detail · Contract table]

| Milestone | Due | Amount (USD) | Status |
|-----------|-----|--------------|--------|
| M1 | 2026-05-01 | 50,000 | Paid |
| M2 | 2026-07-01 | 50,000 | Invoiced |
| M3 | 2026-09-01 | 50,000 | Not started |
| **Total** | | **150,000** | |

If M2 should be 45,000 per amendment, what total contract value error exists?
correct_answer_exact: Total should be $145,000 (M2 is $5,000 too high).
rubric: Must identify $5,000 overstatement (total should be 145,000) or that M2 line is wrong vs total. Accept clear numeric explanation.

prompt:
[Detail · Inventory count]

| Bin | System qty | Count qty | Delta |
|-----|------------|-----------|-------|
| A1 | 120 | 118 | -2 |
| B4 | 45 | 45 | 0 |
| C2 | 80 | 83 | +3 |
| **Sum** | **245** | **246** | **+1** |

Do the row deltas sum to the stated total delta?

[Detail · Calendar invite]

> **Title:** Q3 planning
> **Time:** 2026-07-21 10:00–11:00 America/Chicago
> **Location:** Zoom (link)
> **Description:** "Agenda: budgets. Please join at 9am PT."

What time inconsistency might confuse Pacific attendees?

[Detail · Receipt]

> **Cafe receipt**
> Subtotal: $18.40
> Tax (8.875%): $1.63
> Tip: $3.00
> **Total: $23.03**

Is the total arithmetically correct?

[Detail · Data entry]

| Employee ID | Name | Dept | Manager ID |
|-------------|------|------|------------|
| E102 | Ana Ruiz | Sales | M200 |
| E103 | Ben Lee | Sales | M201 |
| E104 | Ana Ruiz | Ops | M200 |

What data-quality issue should HR fix before the next payroll sync?
rubric: Must flag duplicate/reused name (Ana Ruiz on E102 and E104) and/or E104 dept mismatch vs E102 — possible ID reuse or duplicate person record.

prompt:
[Detail · PO vs packing slip]

> **PO-5510 line 2:** SKU XJ-44, qty 24
> **Packing slip:** SKU XJ-44, qty 42

What discrepancy should receiving flag?

[Detail · Spreadsheet formula]

| Region | Q1 | Q2 | QoQ % |
|--------|-----|-----|-------|
| West | 100 | 120 | 20% |
| East | 80 | 72 | -10% |
| East QoQ cell shows: 12% |

Which region's QoQ percentage is wrong?

[Detail · Access list]

> **Prod DB readers (Jul 15 export)**
> - svc_reporting
> - jsmith (terminated Jun 30)
> - alee
> - temp_audit_jul (expires Jul 31)

Which entry violates typical access hygiene?

[Detail · Bank details]

> **Invoice footer**
> Wire to: First National Bank
> Routing (ACH): 111000025
> Routing (wire): 021000021
> Account: 998877665
> **Remittance email:** ap@vendor.com
> **Remittance email (repeat):** ap@vender.com

Identify two detail errors a payer should verify.
rubric: Must catch typo in second email (vender vs vendor) and should note duplicate/conflicting emails or wire vs ACH routing confusion. At least one concrete error required.

prompt:
[Detail · Version matrix]

| Component | Required | Deployed |
|-----------|----------|----------|
| api | 2.4.0 | 2.4.0 |
| worker | 2.4.0 | 2.3.9 |
| web | 2.4.1 | 2.4.1 |

Which deployed version fails the required matrix?

[Detail · Shift schedule]

| Worker | Shift start | Shift end | Hours |
|--------|-------------|-----------|-------|
| Kim | 22:00 | 06:00 | 8.0 |
| Luis | 06:00 | 14:00 | 8.0 |
| Sam | 14:00 | 22:00 | 7.0 |

Which shift hours column is incorrect?

[Detail · Tax form]

> **1099 preview**
> Recipient TIN: ***-**-4829
> Amount: $12,450.00
> Box 1 (Nonemployee comp): $12,450.00
> Box 4 (Federal tax withheld): $12,450.00

Which box value is implausible for a standard 1099-NEC?

[Detail · URL params]

```
Tracking link: https://app.co/reports?view=summary&view=detail&date=2026-07-01&date=2026-07-31
```

What ambiguity should QA flag in this URL?
rubric: Must note duplicate query keys (view, date) with conflicting values — behavior undefined without spec. Credit for suggesting canonical single-value params.

prompt:
[Detail · Meeting attendees]

> **Invite list:** pm@co.com, eng-lead@co.com, legal@co.com
> **Minutes distribution:** pm@co.com, eng-lead@co.com, finance@co.com
> **Action owner (legal review):** not listed in minutes distribution

Who was on the invite but missing from minutes distribution?

[Detail · Unit conversion]

> **Spec:** Cable length 15 ft
> **Vendor quote:** 4.5 m (~14.8 ft)
> **Warehouse label:** 15 m

Which document likely has the unit error?

[Detail · Duplicate payment]

| Payment ID | Invoice | Amount | Date |
|------------|---------|--------|------|
| P-901 | INV-2201 | 1,200 | Jul 10 |
| P-915 | INV-2201 | 1,200 | Jul 12 |
| P-920 | INV-2203 | 800 | Jul 12 |

Which payments suggest a duplicate pay risk?

[Detail · Config drift]

```yaml
# staging.yaml
rate_limit: 1000
feature_x: true

# prod.yaml (exported)
rate_limit: 100
feature_x: true
feature_y: true
```

Which prod change most likely causes user-visible throttling, and what value differs?
correct_answer_exact: rate_limit: 100 in prod vs 1000 in staging
rubric: Must identify rate_limit dropped from 1000 to 100 in prod. Optional note feature_y is prod-only but throttling tied to rate_limit.

prompt:
[Detail · Name mismatch]

> **Passport name:** OLIVIA CHEN
> **Payroll name:** Olivia Chen-Wu
> **Bank account name:** O. Chen

Which record is most likely to fail bank verification for payroll deposit?
options: Bank account name vs payroll legal name

|------|-----------|-----------|
| Screw M4 | 12 | 12 |
| Bracket | 2 | 3 |
| Gasket | 1 | 1 |

rubric: Must identify Bracket qty 2→3. Optional mention others unchanged.
